name: DEVONthink MCP Server
what_it_does: DEVONthink MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with DEVONthink — the powerful macOS document management and knowledge base application — searching and reading stored documents, adding new content, querying the AI-powered smart folders, and integrating DEVONthink's research database into agent-driven knowledge management and document retrieval workflows.
use_cases: Searching DEVONthink database for relevant research from knowledge agents
Adding documents and notes to DEVONthink from capture agents
Retrieving stored PDFs and documents for AI analysis from research agents
Building knowledge management workflows that write to DEVONthink
Querying smart groups and tags from information retrieval agents
Integrating DEVONthink with AI research pipelines from academic agents
not_for: Teams without DEVONthink licenses (significant cost for pro versions)
Notion, Obsidian, or other note-taking users — use appropriate MCPs
best_when: A DEVONthink power user needs AI agents to search, retrieve, and add to their DEVONthink knowledge base as part of research or document management workflows.
avoid_when: You don't use DEVONthink, or prefer cross-platform solutions — Obsidian, Notion, or Confluence MCPs are more widely compatible.

auth.notes: No authentication — communicates with DEVONthink via AppleScript or URL schemes. DEVONthink must be running on macOS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — DEVONthink Personal: $99, Pro: $199, Server: $499
pricing.notes: DEVONthink is a paid app. Community MCP is free. DEVONthink must be licensed and installed.

performance.rate_limits: Local — no rate limits; DEVONthink database size affects search speed

known_agent_gotchas: DEVONthink must be running and unlocked for database access
AppleScript-based communication may require accessibility permissions
Large DEVONthink databases can make search slow
Community MCP from dvcrn — well-maintained for macOS power users
DEVONthink edition matters — Pro features not available in Personal
AppleScript may break with major DEVONthink updates — check compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local macOS integration. No network access. No credentials. Community MCP. DEVONthink may contain sensitive research — access is local only. AppleScript needs accessibility permissions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local only. No credentials. Community MCP. AppleScript accessibility permissions.
